failedAssertions.reason: The deployer no longer has admin/governance root, but the governed deployment snapshot shows the deployer still retains privileged EMERGENCY, RISK_ADMIN, TREASURY, and MINTER roles, so the validation contract's stricter no-residual-privilege requirement is not met.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The terminal-hardhat assignment proved the governance activation flow on MarketVersionRegistry, but the required frontend reflection evidence could not be exercised on this terminal-only surface.

appliedUpdates.description: Added terminal-hardhat concurrency guidance and an explicit Flow Validator Guidance section for governance-overhaul validation.
